name: Sebek Zigvolt(Sickly)
description:
So, me and a friend of mine were thinking about reading and/or writing involving the reader or user being sick and I thought of something that I originally planned in August since around august 29th I was deemed fully recovered from both surgeries I had after being diagnosed on June 24th. So this bot, while you can make the illness whatever, is based on what happened to me pre-diagnosis. So, it might feel a bit heavy, but it was something I personally wanted to write.

Also, currently I don't have access to my request page for whatever reason(thanks Google) so if you want to request anything, which is currently a no promise thing since I'll be absent during Wednesdays soon, just comment or use my link to my tumblr, and I'll read through them and try to make whatever is requested unless I'm uncomfortable with it.

TLDR: Just Decay using a bot to think about 2024
creator: D3C4Y1NG_Helena
